metadata.title: WPA Global Institutions Master List
metadata.status: Pre-publication candidate / internal review. Not final public benchmark until source and visual verification are completed.

groups.A: Protocol & Diplomacy Core (25 records total, including 1 reported cooperation-model observation)
groups.B: Diplomatic Academies (25 records total, including 1 reported cooperation-model observation)

metadata.note: Dataset unchanged from CORRECTED-4B. CORRECTED-4E consolidates the package and replaces portable PDF/DOCX layout, QA report and changelog.

institutions.name: Protocol School of Washington / INAAR Saudi Arabia — Reported Cooperation Model
institutions.notes: METHODOLOGY: This record documents a reported cooperation model between Protocol School of Washington (A001) and INAAR Saudi Arabia (A004). Not a verified institutional entity. Included as methodological observation only. Subject to formal verification.

institutions.name: IEPA London — International Etiquette and Protocol Academy
Protocol Academy of Kosovo — reported affiliated branch / historical branded presence
institutions.institution_type: Reported affiliated branch / historical branded training presence
institutions.notes: METHODOLOGY: This record refers to a reported/archived branded presence named Protocol Academy of Kosovo, presented together with Protocol Academy of Macedonia in older public web material. It should not be interpreted as a currently verified independent official protocol academy in Kosovo without source verification. Contact and copyright indicators in the referenced web material point to Protocol Academy of Macedonia / Skopje context. Included as a historical or affiliated training-presence observation, pending verification.
